Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS ALBERT DUNCAN AND CHRIS KULJIS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS.
Appearances: Kevin Brunner of Siegel & Yee (510.839.1200) for plaintiffs and moving parties; Larry Hecimovich of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3933) for defendant and responding party.
The parties stipulated to the matter being decided by a Judge Pro Tem. Argued and the court ruled as follows: Granted in part. Information is to be provided pursuant to a protective order on an outside counsel's eyes only basis. Plaintiffs to submit a proposed form of order. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Not reported

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)
